description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages test, build, and package. Use the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image for the unit-test-job in the test stage, run mvn package -B, and archive the resulting omod files (omod/target/*.omod) as artifacts that expire in 5 days. In the build stage add a publish job that depends on unit-test-job, runs only on the master branch, uses the same Maven image, and executes three curl commands to delete, upload, and publish a Bintray artifact using $BINTRAY_API_USER and $BINTRAY_API_KEY. In the package stage add a docker-build job that runs on all branches except master, logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER/$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, builds and pushes a Docker image tagged "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/toolkit:${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}" using docker build --pull, and a docker-build-master job that runs only on master, logs in similarly, builds and pushes the image tagged "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/toolkit". Both Docker jobs use the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service.
